query: INSERT INTO threat_group_events (tgeActorId, eventType, tgeTitle, tgeDescription, tgeSeverity, tgeVictimName, tgeVictimSector, tgeVictimCountry, tgeMitreTechniques, tgeIocs, tgeSource, tgeSourceUrl, tgeConfidence, eventDate) VALUES ('fulcrumsec', 'attack', 'FULCRUMSEC claims 850GB breach of Avnet', 'First known victim. FULCRUMSEC claimed exfiltration of 850GB from Avnet, a major US electronics distributor ($23B revenue). Published on DLS and Telegram.', 'high', 'Avnet', 'Electronics', 'United States', '["T1190", "T1530"]', '[{"type":"domain","value":"fulcrumsec.net"},{"type":"onion","value":"gsgot6tua7ffammwdv6vpxkog32b4z7qivtqkxz55afq2hkt2o24w5yd.onion"}]', 'WatchGuard Ransomware Tracker', 'https://www.watchguard.com/wgrd-security-hub/ransomware-tracker/fulcrumsec', 85, '2025-09-26 00:00:00'), ('fulcrumsec', 'attack', 'FULCRUMSEC claims 300GB breach of youX (Australia)', 'FULCRUMSEC claimed exfiltration of 300GB from youX, an Australian FinTech company. Published on DLS and Telegram.', 'high', 'youX', 'FinTech', 'Australia', '["T1190", "T1530"]', '[{"type":"domain","value":"fulcrumsec.net"},{"type":"telegram","value":"https://t.me/fulcrumsec"}]', 'WatchGuard Ransomware Tracker', 'https://www.watchguard.com/wgrd-security-hub/ransomware-tracker/fulcrumsec', 85, '2025-10-15 00:00:00'), ('fulcrumsec', 'attack', 'FULCRUMSEC claims breach of Raptor Supplies (UK)', 'FULCRUMSEC claimed breach of Raptor Supplies, a UK military/industrial supplier. Published on DLS.', 'high', 'Raptor Supplies', 'Military/Industrial', 'United Kingdom', '["T1190"]', '[{"type":"domain","value":"fulcrumsec.net"}]', 'WatchGuard Ransomware Tracker', 'https://www.watchguard.com/wgrd-security-hub/ransomware-tracker/fulcrumsec', 85, '2025-11-01 00:00:00'), ('fulcrumsec', 'infrastructure_change', 'FULCRUMSEC establishes DLS, Telegram, and clearnet presence', 'Group established multi-channel presence: TOR DLS (gsgot6tua7ffammwdv6vpxkog32b4z7qivtqkxz55afq2hkt2o24w5yd.onion), clearnet (fulcrumsec.net), Telegram (t.me/fulcrumsec), email (fulcrumsec@tuta.io, threatspians@fulcrumsec.net), Tox ID, and DarkForums presence.', 'medium', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, '[{"type":"domain","value":"fulcrumsec.net"},{"type":"onion","value":"gsgot6tua7ffammwdv6vpxkog32b4z7qivtqkxz55afq2hkt2o24w5yd.onion"},{"type":"telegram","value":"https://t.me/fulcrumsec"},{"type":"email","value":"fulcrumsec@tuta.io"},{"type":"email","value":"threatspians@fulcrumsec.net"},{"type":"tox","value":"6A5E9ED3D7D26CAD5E6CA4E229CC80DA3C13AD002F73D4450078284E6C762F6DBDCF1FE9BF44"}]', 'WatchGuard Ransomware Tracker', 'https://www.watchguard.com/wgrd-security-hub/ransomware-tracker/fulcrumsec', 90, '2025-09-01 00:00:00'), ('fulcrumsec', 'ttp_evolution', 'FULCRUMSEC adopts cloud-focused attack methodology', 'Group demonstrated advanced cloud exploitation capabilities: React2Shell web app exploitation → container role compromise → AWS lateral movement (Redshift, VPC databases, Secrets Manager). Represents evolution from standard data theft to cloud infrastructure penetration.', 'high', NULL, NULL, NULL, '["T1190", "T1078", "T1078.004", "T1530", "T1537", "T1552.005", "T1552.001", "T1580", "T1619", "T1087.004"]', NULL, 'Daily Dark Web', 'https://dailydarkweb.net/lexisnexis-investigates-massive-data-breach-by-fulcrumsec/', 85, '2026-03-03 00:00:00'), ('fulcrumsec', 'attack', 'FULCRUMSEC claims massive LexisNexis breach (2.04GB)', 'FULCRUMSEC claimed breach of LexisNexis (RELX Group, $80B company). Exfiltrated 2.04GB including 536 Redshift tables, 430+ VPC database tables, 53 AWS Secrets Manager secrets in plaintext, 3.9M Enterprise Data Warehouse records, ~400K cloud user profiles, 118 government user accounts (federal judges, DOJ attorneys, SEC staff), 21K customer account records, and 45 employee password hashes. Attack vector: React2Shell vulnerability → container role → AWS lateral movement. Threat actor quote: "They sell risk intelligence. They could not patch their own React app months after React2Shell broke."', 'critical', 'LexisNexis (RELX Group)', 'Legal & Professional Services', 'United States', '["T1190", "T1078", "T1078.004", "T1530", "T1537", "T1552.005", "T1552.001", "T1580", "T1619", "T1087.004"]', '[{"type":"domain","value":"fulcrumsec.net"},{"type":"onion","value":"gsgot6tua7ffammwdv6vpxkog32b4z7qivtqkxz55afq2hkt2o24w5yd.onion"},{"type":"email","value":"fulcrumsec@tuta.io"},{"type":"telegram","value":"https://t.me/fulcrumsec"}]', 'Daily Dark Web', 'https://dailydarkweb.net/lexisnexis-investigates-massive-data-breach-by-fulcrumsec/', 85, '2026-03-03 00:00:00'), ('fulcrumsec', 'data_leak', 'KrakenLabs confirms FULCRUMSEC as active data extortion group', 'KrakenLabs threat intelligence team confirmed FULCRUMSEC as a data extortion group first seen in late Sep-Oct 2025 (claims activity since Aug 2025). They run a classic steal-then-threaten play, amplifying impact by publishing across DLS, underground forums, and Telegram. Advertised on DarkForums. Risk assessment: enables targeted phishing, account takeover attempts, and sensitive legal/government user profiling. Spillover risk to law firms and public-sector workflows. Claim has NOT been independently verified.', 'high', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'KrakenLabs (@KrakenLabs_Team)', 'https://x.com/KrakenLabs_Team/status/2029114296475451696', 80, '2026-03-04 00:00:00');
